question_text: Two household appliances are compared: a microwave rated at 800 W and a toaster rated at 1200 W. Both are switched on for the same length of time. Which statement is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: The microwave transfers more energy because it has a lower power rating.

options.label: B
options.text: The toaster transfers more energy because it has a higher power rating.

options.label: C
options.text: Both appliances transfer the same amount of energy regardless of their power ratings.

options.label: D
options.text: The microwave transfers more energy because microwaves are more efficient.

explanation: Power is the rate of energy transfer. Since the toaster has a higher power rating (1200 W compared to 800 W), it transfers more energy per second, so over the same time period it will transfer more total energy.
